name: 强制纠缠定序器
descs: 回合开始时，使[Vibration]层数最高的1名友方单位的[Vibration]以[VibrationDistribution][FusionVibration]
回合开始时，使[Vibration]层数最高的<style="upgradeHighlight">2</style>名友方单位的[Vibration]以[VibrationDistribution][FusionVibration]
回合开始时，使[Vibration]层数最高的<style="upgradeHighlight">3</style>名友方单位的[Vibration]以[VibrationDistribution][FusionVibration]
